{{Infobox character
| name = Deborah
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Deborah]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Deborah]] has a realm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] will form a team to support [[Deborah]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Deborah]] is a character associated with a [[Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
